# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you find a vulnerability, please **do not** open a public issue.

Instead, email **asadlimehdi25@gmail.com** (until we have a dedicated business security email address like `security@brigada.mom`) with:

- A description of the vulnerability
- Date and time, Browser, Operating System, and any other relevant information
- Steps to reproduce the vulnerability
- Potential impact on users
- If you can, provide image or video files

You should receive a response within 72 hours. We will work with you to understand and address the issue before any public disclosure.
